nasb.text: He carved on it cherubim, palm trees, and open flowers; and he overlaid them with gold evenly applied on the engraved work.

esv.text: On them he carved cherubim and palm trees and open flowers, and he overlaid them with gold evenly applied on the carved work.

cnv.text: 他又在上面刻上了基路伯、棕樹和初開的花朵；又在雕刻上緊貼上金子。

ccb.text: 上面刻着基路伯天使、棕树和花朵的图案，并包上金。
